creator: darius@holly.dons.net.au
text:
A new port -
Qplug is a plugin for netscape which shows info on Quake I & II servers. This
port only works with the native version of Netscape (since it's a native
plugin). The Netscape dependancy might want altering.. 

Uploaded to ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/qplug_port.tar.gz
